newsletter.title: Join the VIONIS·XY World
newsletter.subtitle: Be the first to discover new collections, exclusive offers and the art of natural luxury.

home.womenBody: Every fibre is sourced from white cashmere goats roaming the Alxa desert of Inner Mongolia. Our spring edit selects only the finest first-clip fleece at around 14.5 microns, crafted into lighter weights that preserve the natural softness and warmth cashmere is known for. Same origin, gentler touch.
home.menBody: The Alxa white cashmere goat produces some of the world's finest fibres. Our spring collection carries the same structured silhouettes and uncompromising quality, re-engineered in lighter gauges for the transitional season. Less weight, nothing lost.
home.storyBody: True elegance does not need to shout. At VIONIS·XY, we believe in the power of subtraction — removing the excess to reveal the essential quality of Merino and Cashmere. Each piece is crafted to outlast trends and outlive seasons.
home.blogBody1: Inner Mongolia, -30°C. The world's finest cashmere is born from extreme cold.
home.blogBody2: 18.5 microns — three times finer than human hair. Every fibre chosen with precision.
home.blogBody3: Every VIONIS·XY piece undergoes SGS laboratory testing to confirm 100% natural fiber composition. No blends. No shortcuts.
home.blogBody4: True luxury whispers. VIONIS·XY is for those who know the difference.
home.blogBody5: Every VIONIS·XY garment is constructed with tension-balanced knitting — engineered for durability, designed for longevity.
